note: Which interior/organ sites the campaign's experiments have exercised. The inside-out draw is biased toward the COLD regions below — the sites no experiment has stressed yet, where untested assumptions (and hand-set constants) hide.

src/core/voidnull.js: the alpha knob — the OTHER human constant in the Born/null path (spec-one-surprise Track B)
src/core/enacted/loop.js: the impulse threshold (absolute 0.95 on a scale the meaning-reader never reaches — a named-but-untaken constant fix)
src/core/cube.js: the 27 cells — EVA/REC and the empty SYN-by-Ground are the thin cells the corpus shows impoverished
